---
title: "Quentin Durward by Sir Walter Scott Edited, with a historical introduction, by CMY"
---

## Quentin Durward by Sir Walter Scott Edited, with a historical introduction, by CMY

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1890
**Genre:** Non-fiction: criticism
**Format:** Preface to book

**Publisher:** Boston: Ginn and Company

### Notes

Ginn’s Children’s Classics series, in which  <i>The Talisman</i> also appeared with a preface by CMY, although she is not credited as its editor.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
